title: Grammy Awards: Full Winners List - Hollywood Reporter
text:
2026 Grammy Awards: Song of the Year Winner

Winner: "WILDFLOWER" by Billie Eilsch and Finneas O'Connell

Songwriters: Billie Eilsch O'Connell & Finneas O'Connell

The track claimed the Song of the Year honor at the 68th annual Grammy Awards ceremony held on February 1, 2026. During her acceptance speech, Eilsch joined other artists in speaking out about immigration enforcement, making a statement beyond the musical achievement itself.

This victory marks another significant achievement for the songwriting partnership between Billie Eilsch and her brother Finneas, continuing their consistent recognition at the Recording Academy's annual awards ceremony.
